channel.title: GitHub Nix Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Nix in GitHub

item.title: NixOS/nixpkgs
item.description: Nix Packages collection & NixOS

item.title: NotAShelf/nvf
item.description: A highly modular, extensible and distro-agnostic Neovim configuration framework for Nix/NixOS.

item.title: LnL7/nix-darwin
item.description: nix modules for darwin

item.title: NixOS/nixos-hardware
item.description: A collection of NixOS modules covering hardware quirks.

item.title: Misterio77/nix-starter-configs
item.description: Simple and documented config templates to help you get started with NixOS + home-manager + flakes. All the boilerplate you need!

item.title: the-nix-way/dev-templates
item.description: Dev environments for numerous languages based on Nix flakes [maintainer=@lucperkins]

item.title: mitchellh/nixos-config
item.description: My NixOS configurations.

item.title: Misterio77/nix-config
item.description: Personal nixos and home-manager configurations.

item.title: nix-community/impermanence
item.description: Modules to help you handle persistent state on systems with ephemeral root storage [maintainer=@talyz]

item.title: lilyinstarlight/nixos-cosmic
item.description: Flake for using COSMIC on NixOS

item.title: nix-community/disko
item.description: Declarative disk partitioning and formatting using nix [maintainers=@Lassulus @Enzime @iFreilicht]

item.title: nix-community/nixvim
item.description: Configure Neovim with Nix! [maintainers=@GaetanLepage, @traxys, @MattSturgeon, @khaneliman]

item.title: Mic92/sops-nix
item.description: Atomic secret provisioning for NixOS based on sops

item.title: gmodena/nix-flatpak
item.description: Install flatpaks declaratively

item.title: ryantm/agenix
item.description: age-encrypted secrets for NixOS and Home manager

item.title: nix-community/nix-on-droid
item.description: Nix-enabled environment for your Android device. [maintainers=@t184256,@Gerschtli]

item.title: cachix/devenv
item.description: Fast, Declarative, Reproducible, and Composable Developer Environments

item.title: nix-community/nixos-generators
item.description: Collection of image builders [maintainer=@Lassulus]

item.title: nix-community/raspberry-pi-nix
item.description: NixOS modules to aid in configuring NixOS for raspberry pi products

item.title: Tow-Boot/Tow-Boot
item.description: An opinionated distribution of U-Boot. — https://matrix.to/#/#Tow-Boot:matrix.org?via=matrix.org
